description: SurveyMonkey is an online survey and forms platform for creating surveys, collecting responses, and analyzing feedback. It is used by individuals and organizations to gather insights from customers, employees, and other audiences.
summary: SurveyMonkey exposes a REST API at https://api.surveymonkey.com/v3 authenticated with OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens, plus an MCP server at https://mcp.surveymonkey.com/mcp using OAuth 2.0.
